provenance.method: FAO-56 crop water budget across Michigan atlas stations
provenance.data_source: Open-Meteo ERA5 reanalysis (free, no API key)
references: Allen RG et al. (1998) FAO-56: Crop Evapotranspiration
Stewart JI et al. (1977) Water Production Functions, ICID
provenance._tolerance_justification: Mass balance tol 0.01 mm (FAO-56 Ch 8 conservation); ET0 R² > 0.85 vs PM baseline; per-station yield ratio within Stewart (1977) Ky bounds
